metadata.name: localvolts-api
metadata.summary: A Python wrapper for the LocalVolts API

methods.name: localvolts_api.market_api.MarketData.__getattr__
documentation:
This method is called when an attribute lookup has not found the attribute in the usual places.
It allows access to the dictionary keys as if they were attributes.

methods.name: localvolts_api.market_api.MarketAPI.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the MarketAPI class with LocalvoltsAuth instance.

```
param auth

LocalvoltsAuth - An instance of the LocalvoltsAuth class for handling authentication.
```

methods.name: localvolts_api.market_api.MarketAPI.get_market_stats
documentation:
Retrieve market statistics.

```
return

dict - The response data from the Localvolts API.
```

methods.name: localvolts_api.auth.LocalvoltsAuth.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the LocalvoltsAuth class with the given API key and Partner ID.

```
param api_key

str - The API key for authenticating with the Localvolts API.

param partner_id

str - The Partner ID for authenticating with the Localvolts API.
```

methods.name: localvolts_api.auth.LocalvoltsAuth.get_headers
documentation:
Generate headers for API requests.

```
return

dict - A dictionary containing the necessary headers for API authentication.
```

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.NMI
documentation: National Meter Identifier for which data is being provided. All data is that obtained at the NMI location. NMI will be a 10 character id, without checksum.

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.battery
documentation: ‘A’ or ’U’ A: battery is operational and available U: battery is unavailable

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.control
documentation: ‘E’ or ‘A’ E: Battery control is enabled but not activated A: Battery is being controlled externally

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.intervalDuration
documentation: Duration of the interval in minutes. Default is 5 minutes

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.intervalDurationUnits
documentation: ‘minutes’

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.intervalEnd
documentation: Time at the end of the NEM interval, in UTC (24-hour format). Note that the NEM always runs off AEST (UTC+10)

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.importsMainLoad
documentation: energy drawn from the grid on the main circuit

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.importsMainLoadUnits
documentation: ‘Wh’

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.importsControlledLoad
documentation: energy drawn from the grid on the controlled load circuit

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.exports
documentation: energy injected into the grid

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.exportsUnits
documentation: ‘Wh’

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batteryCharging
documentation: power being drawn by the battery

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batteryChargingUnits
documentation: ‘kW’

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batteryDischarging
documentation: power being discharged by the battery

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batteryDischargingUnits
documentation: ‘kW’

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batteryEnergy
documentation: useable energy stored in the battery

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batteryEnergyUnits
documentation: ‘kWh’

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.batterySOC
documentation: useable energy stored in the battery as % of total capacity

class_variables.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.IntervalData.lastUpdate
documentation: date/time this data-set was updated, in UTC (YYYY-MM- DDTHH:mm:ssZ)

methods.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.CustomerAPI.__init__
documentation:
Initialize the CustomerAPI with authentication details.

```
param auth

LocalvoltsAuth - An instance of the LocalvoltsAuth class for API authentication.
```

methods.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.CustomerAPI.get_interval_data
documentation:
Fetches interval data for a given NMI and time range.

```
param nmi

str - The NMI to query. Use '*' for all NMIs.

param from_time

str - The start time in ISO 8601 UTC format.

param to_time

str - The end time in ISO 8601 UTC format.

return

CustomerIntervalData - Custom object containing the response data.
```

methods.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.CustomerAPI.set_interval_data
documentation:
Sets interval data for a given NMI.

```
param nmi

str - The NMI to update.

param interval_data

dict - The interval data to set.

return

dict - The response data.
```

methods.name: localvolts_api.customer_api.CustomerAPI.get_interval_data_df
documentation:
Fetches interval data for a given NMI and time range and returns it as a pandas DataFrame.

```
param nmi

str - The NMI to query. Use '*' for all NMIs.

param from_time

str - The start time in ISO 8601 UTC format.

param to_time

str - The end time in ISO 8601 UTC format.

return

pandas.DataFrame - The response data as a DataFrame.
```
